items.title: Ghislaine Maxwell pleads Fifth Amendment, dodges questions in House Oversight Epstein probe
items.description: Ghislaine Maxwell refused to answer questions before the House Oversight Committee on Monday morning.

items.title: Federal judge orders Fulton County election raid documents to be unsealed
items.description: A federal judge gave the government until Tuesday to release a redacted search warrant affidavit from a January FBI raid that seized 2020 election mat...

items.title: US forces hunt down and board tanker ship defying Trump admin quarantine
items.description: U.S. forces boarded the ship that defied President Donald Trump's quarantine of sanctioned ships in the Caribbean, according to the War Department.

items.title: Hochul running mate voted to allow noncitizen voting in NYC elections
items.description: Empire State Gov. Kathy Hochul's running mate Adrienne Adams previously sought to allow some noncitizens to vote in Big Apple municipal elections.
